---
name: UI/UX Feedback
about: Report confusing interface elements or suggest layout improvements
title: '[UX] '
labels: ['ux', 'beta-feedback']
assignees: ''
---

**Area of the App**
e.g., Upload Screen, Review Dashboard, CBT Runtime, Results Page

**Describe the UX Issue**
A clear description of what feels confusing, clunky, or could be improved.

**Proposed Improvement**
How would you change the design to make it more intuitive?

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to illustrate the area of confusion.
